name: forgechat
description: RTCForge apps monorepo — five real-time products (chat, live streaming, collaborative, meet, massive) built on the rtcforge stack. Node backends + React/Chakra frontends, sharing packages/rtc-shared.

scripts.dev:1: concurrently -k -n 1-chat-be,1-chat-fe -c blue,magenta "pnpm -C apps/chat/backend dev" "pnpm -C apps/chat/frontend dev"
scripts.dev:2: concurrently -k -n 2-live-be,2-live-fe -c blue,magenta "pnpm -C apps/live-streaming/backend dev" "pnpm -C apps/live-streaming/frontend dev"
scripts.dev:3: concurrently -k -n 3-collab-be,3-collab-fe -c blue,magenta "pnpm -C apps/collaborative/backend dev" "pnpm -C apps/collaborative/frontend dev"
scripts.dev:4: concurrently -k -n 4-meet-be,4-meet-fe -c blue,magenta "pnpm -C apps/meet/backend dev" "pnpm -C apps/meet/frontend dev"
scripts.dev:5: concurrently -k -n 5-massive-be,5-massive-fe -c blue,magenta "pnpm -C apps/massive/backend dev" "pnpm -C apps/massive/frontend dev"
scripts.test: pnpm test:1 && pnpm test:2 && pnpm test:3 && pnpm test:4 && pnpm test:5
